samples.description: Mixed English/Japanese martial arts page with one diagram.
samples.sample_text:
Donn Draeger studied classical bujutsu.
武道とは何か。
Daitō-ryū Aiki-jūjutsu and koryū terminology should survive cleanup.

notes: Diagram should not be mistaken for normal body text.
Macrons in Daitō-ryū and koryū should be preserved.

samples.description: Diagram-heavy page used to check figure extraction and crop quality.

notes: Large diagrams should produce stable bounding boxes.
Tiny scan marks should be ignored.
